curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch modifies two source files: src/normalize-unicode.ts (normalizeUnicode function) where the NFD normalization was extended with toLocaleLowerCase and toLocaleUpperCase to handle Unicode ligature collisions, and src/path-reservations.ts (reserve method) where the redundant toLowerCase call was removed since case folding is now handled in normalizeUnicode. Both files are vulnerable locations in the pre-patch code because the incomplete normalization in normalizeUnicode directly causes the PathReservations system to fail to serialize colliding paths.
